ActionItems: Confirm 12 table sponsorships before March to cover fixed gala costs
Lock catering headcount two weeks out to avoid rush pricing
Recruit two additional in-kind donors for the auction to lift net margin
BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Break-even review for the Desert Bloom Under the Stars gala, prepared for Diana Ochoa ahead of the spring board meeting.

CurrentState.Note: Monthly figures reflect ongoing shelter operations; gala revenue is tracked separately as a once-yearly campaign.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: The gala breaks even at 110 paid general tickets or 12 table sponsorships; everything above that funds the empowerment program.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Fixed costs of 2,950 divided by 25 per sustaining donor equals 118 donors.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Modest rent increase pushes break-even up by 6 sustaining donors.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Rent rises to 2,100/mo

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Larger rent increase erodes reserve contribution; offset with one extra table sponsor.
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Rent rises to 2,300/mo
